recalls.Description: Calico Brands is recalling the Scripto® Premium Torch, which features a four-position adjustable metal nozzle, adjustable flame, hands-free operation lock, and a black ergonomic non-slip rubber grip. This product, which has a metal base with a black velvet bottom, poses significant fire and burn hazards, violating mandatory safety standards for multipurpose lighters. The UPC for this product is 0-70257-52226-6, located on the back of the product box.
recalls.Title: Calico Brands Issues Recall for Scripto Premium Torches Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can contact Calico Brands at 800-544-4837 from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, email premiumtorchrecall@calicobrands.com, or visit www.calicobrands.com/premiumtorchrecall.html. Additional details can be found by clicking on 'Product Recall' at the bottom of the homepage.

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart and Home Depot stores nationwide, as well as online at Walmart.com and Homedepot.com from November 2024 through August 2025, priced around $15.

Hazards.Name: Fire and burn hazards due to violation of safety standards for multipurpose lighters.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the torches immediately and return them to the retailer for a full refund or store credit. Alternatively, they can contact Calico Brands for return instructions and receive a shipping label along with appropriate hazmat packaging to return the torches at no cost.

recalls.metaDescription: Calico Brands recalls Scripto Premium Torches due to fire and burn risks. Stop using immediately and return for a refund.
